intent: Validate Phase 1 (VoxelEntities) replaces actor billboards with voxel meshes.
Validate Phase 2 (ProceduralBuildings) renders buildings as procedural meshes.
Validate Phase 3 (CrossedQuadFoliage) renders trees and bushes with crossed quads and wind animation.
Validate Phase 4 (MeshWater) renders water with Gerstner waves and shoreline foam.
Validate Phase 5 (HighShadows) renders directional sun shadows with cascaded shadow maps.
Validate Phase 6 (SkeletalAnimation) animates voxel actors via skeleton rig.
Validate Phase 7 (WorldspaceUI) renders nameplates, HP bars, and selection rings in 3D space.
Validate Phase 8 (DayNightCycle) cycles sky color from dawn to noon to dusk.
Validate Phase 9 (PostFX) applies bloom and color grading post-processing effects.
Validate Phase 10 (LOD Impostor) gates distant entities to impostor billboards for performance.
